metadata.evidenceSummary: Hardened dashboard route-level read-only behavior. Static checks now block dashboard server request input use, smoke checks query strings do not shape mirror output, and smoke/live checks verify POST, PUT, PATCH, and DELETE are unavailable on /api/dashboard while the browser still shows only mirror state.

metadata.evidenceSummary: Dashboard mirror responses now include explicit cross-origin opener/resource isolation, origin agent clustering, DNS prefetch disablement, legacy frame denial, and stricter CSP directives for frames, manifests, objects, and workers. Smoke and live checks confirmed those headers on root, dashboard, API, health, and missing fallback responses, while the browser DOM remained free of command text, raw workflow state, links, forms, or unmarked controls.

metadata.evidenceSummary: Dashboard presentation is now a single fixed navy mirror: removed data-theme light/dark hooks, old themed-scroll class, light-mode Tailwind variants, and body theme transitions. Static checks, smoke, built asset inspection, served asset inspection, and live browser DOM verification confirmed no data-theme or themed-scroll hooks remain, while the dashboard remains command-free and raw-state-free.

value.summary: Scaffolded Flow Desktop shell. Electron main imports flow internals directly (DashboardState, loadFlowConfig), serves existing dashboard via local express server on random port. esbuild bundles main/preload. App launches, dashboard healthz responds. No separate package — desktop lives inside flow as an entry point.
